subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Wahhab! God willing, with true hearing and vision thou wilt hearken unto the call of the Wronged One and turn unto His horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الوهاب انشاء الله بسمع و بصر حقیقی ندای مظلوم را اصغا نمائی و بافقش
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
